title: Honeywell spinoff Solstice to acquire Element Solutions in $14.5B deal to expand AI infrastructure business
description: The race to build the infrastructure behind artificial intelligence is driving another multibillion-dollar acquisition. Solstice Advanced Materials, the specialty chemicals company spun off from Honeywell, has agreed to acquire Element Solutions in a cash-and-stock transaction valued at about $14.5 billion, creating a larger supplier of materials used across semiconductor manufacturing, electronics, and AI data centers.

title: The IFE at Tecnológico de Monterrey drives the transformation of higher education, impacting more than 7.8 million people
description: The future of work will require a greater emphasis on workforce skills and lifelong learning, according to the IFE Impact Report.The report also highlights the advancement of artificial intelligence, microcredentials, and EdTech entrepreneurship as key drivers of higher education transformation and closing talent gaps.

title: Microsoft lays off 4,800 jobs, cuts global workforce by 2.1%; Xbox hit hardest
description: Microsoft said it will eliminate 3,200 jobs in its Xbox division over the current fiscal year as it ramps up investments worth tens of billions of dollars in artificial intelligence (AI). The company said the restructuring reflects a business adapting to a rapidly changing world.
content:
Washington:
Technology giant Microsoft said on Monday that it would be cutting 4,800 jobs, reducing its global workforce by 2.1 per cent. The decision is a part of company's restructuring phase and Xbox will see the majority of job cuts, as Microsoft... [2143 chars]

title: Study shows how flawed AI responses increase physician workloads
description: Artificial intelligence is spreading rapidly in health care, with the goal of streamlining critical but onerous clerical tasks such as note-taking and charting so that physicians and nurses can devote more time to patients.
content:

title: Nestlé Business Solutions to open new GCC at Hyderabad
description: NBS Hyderabad will be set up in partnership with Genpact, which will provide its expertise in process intelligence, data, artificial intelligence (AI) and automation to help Nestlé simplify, standardise and scale its business services.
content: Nestlé Business Solutions (NBS), the shared services arm of the Nestlé Group, will establish a new Global Capability Centre (GCC) in Hyderabad, strengthening the company's global business services network and expanding its future-ready capabilities a... [1858 chars]

title: Universities must rethink how they prepare students for an AI-powered world, study argues
description: Universities need to rethink how they teach, assess and prepare students for employment as artificial intelligence becomes an increasingly important part of everyday life and work, according to a new study from the University of Manchester. The paper, published in Frontiers in Education, argues that AI is changing how people learn, work and make decisions, and that universities need to adapt to this new reality.

title: Is AI ready to take over your prescriptions? Doctors are wary of Utah's automated refill program
description: A prescription refill program that quietly launched in Utah earlier this year has kicked off a big medical debate: Is artificial intelligence ready to take over tasks that, until now, could only be performed by doctors?
